active.description: Whether or not this source should be checked when the ETL runs

backfill_start.description: The date from which to start backfilling all downstream models

cursor_expr.description: An expression to be used as a query cursor for determining which event dates have changed since last time the etl was run

lookback_days.description: The number of days to lookback when querying the source

sql_event_date_updated_timestamps.description: SQL statement which will determine if certain source event dates should be included event if their event_count didn't change, the query should return two columns, event_date and updated_timestamp

sql_retry.description: SQL statement which will be run before a retry if the first attempt to query the source dates fails

type.default: The type of ETL trigger used for models downstream of this source (default is event_count)
